meta.notes: v0.6.0 — adds per-feed `section` field (news|opinion|wire) for Phase 1 opinion-feed exclusion from frame distributions. Defaults: wire_services bucket=wire, opinion_magazines bucket=opinion, plus 3 individual feeds flagged opinion (War on the Rocks, Asia Times, Al Jazeera Arabic). All others default to news. Forward-compatible.
